title: WellVital - Your Health Companion

metaDescription: WellVital - Track your health metrics and wellness journey
summary: WellVital - Track your health metrics and wellness journey
description: WellVital - Track your health metrics and wellness journey
prompt: Build a premium healthcare website inspired by WellVital - Your Health Companion. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
WellVital
Features Track Plans Help
Features Track Plans Help
Health Intelligence

Track Your
Health Journey

Monitor heart rate, sleep, steps, calories, blood pressure, and stress. Get AI-powered insights and personalized recommendations.

2M+

Active Users

500M

Data Points

What We Track

Complete health monitoring in one app

Heart Health

Real-time heart rate monitoring with daily trends

Syncs with Apple Watch, Fitbit

Sleep Quality

Track sleep cycles and get recovery insights

8-hour average = Optimal health

Activity & Steps

10K daily steps goal with progress tracking

Earn badges & rewards

Calories Burned

AI calculates personalized calorie targets

Nutrition integration included

Stress Level

Real-time stress detection and management tips

Meditation guides included

Hydration

Smart reminders to drink water throughout day

2L daily goal tracking

Powerful Features

AI Insights

Machine learning analyzes patterns and predicts health risks before they happen.

Doctor Sharing

Share health data with your doctor for better consultations and faster diagnosis.

Community Support

Join health challenges with friends and stay motivated together.

Privacy First

Your data is encrypted and never shared without your explicit permission.

Simple Pricing

Choose your plan

Free

Perfect to start

$0/mo

  • Step tracking
  • Heart rate basics
  • Weekly reports
POPULAR

Plus

Most features

$9.99/mo

  • All Free features
  • Advanced analytics
  • Sleep tracking
  • AI coaching

Premium

Complete health

$19.99/mo

  • All Plus features
  • Doctor consultation
  • Personalized diet plan
  • Priority support

Questions?

Yes, all data is AES-256 encrypted and stored on secure HIPAA-compliant servers. We never sell your data.
WellVital syncs with Apple Health, Google Fit, Fitbit, Oura Ring, Garmin, and most wearables via API.
Yes, cancel your subscription anytime with no penalties or hidden fees. Simple process in settings.

Take Control of Your Health

Start free today. No credit card needed.
